name: Night Wildlife Survey Lighting & Safety Config
description: You are a Wildlife Biologist preparing an ArduCopter drone for a nocturnal wolf-tracking survey. The drone is equipped with a thermal imager and a 100W LED spotlight. Read the operations brief located at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/night_ops_brief.txt and configure the drone's parameters accordingly. You must map the hardware relay to the correct RC channel for the spotlight and adjust three navigation parameters for safe night flight. Ensure all parameter units match the interface requirements, as some values in the brief may require conversion before entry.
